subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-01-31
subcodes.first_line: The duties and the responsibilities of the Bahá'í are these: They must be kind to all the religions. They must love humankind with all their hearts and souls. They must work for the public welfare.
subcodes.subjects: @universal peace; world unity, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @love and unity, @call to action, @unity; oneness of humanity, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
